info.name: ZenVora Ecommerce API
info.description: Postman collection for testing the CBS Ecommerce / ZenVora Express API modules (Authentication, Categories, Brands, Addresses, Product Tags, Blog Tags, and Reviews).

formdata.description: Optional new image file to upload

body.raw:
{
  "fullname": "Abhishek Jaiswar",

}

{
  "name": "ZenVora Phone X",
  "slug": "zenvora-phone-x",
  "brandId": "{{brandId}}",
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "tagIds": ["{{tagId}}"],
  "excerpt": "Flagship smartphone with stellar camera.",

  "price": 999.99,
  "originalPrice": 1099.99,
  "isNew": true,
